gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (56/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (56/ 4)
text: إِذَا رُفِعَ عِلْمُكُمْ مِنْ بَيْنِ أَظْهُرِكُمْ فَتَوَقَّعُوا الْفَرَجَ مِنْ تَحْتِ أَقْدَامِكُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from one of our companions, from Ayoub Bin Nuh,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 3<sup>rd</sup> having said: ‘When your knowledge would be raised from between your apparent, so anticipate the relief from beneath your feet’.
en.sarwar: 24. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from certain ones of our people from Ayyub ibn Nuh from abu a1-Hassan, the third, (a.s.) who has said the following. “When your knowledge that is with you will banish then expect glad news to emerge beneath your feet.”
